name: facebook-ai-automation-pipeline
description: Facebook webhook and Kafka automation pipeline with 4 services

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:webhook" "npm run start:core" "npm run start:retry"
scripts.test:syntax: node --check backend-api/index.js && node --check backend-api/facebookGraphClient.js && node --check webhook-service/index.js && node --check core-service/index.js && node --check retry-service/index.js
